title: Professional email: nuanced request
subtitle: Write a request with context and flexibility.
overview: B2 emails are polite but precise.
Include context, request, flexibility, next step.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I am writing in relation to...
Quedo a la espera de sus comentarios.

items.es: Le escribo en relación con la reunión prevista para el jueves.
items.en: I am writing in relation to the meeting scheduled for Thursday.

items.es: Entiendo que la fecha ya estaba confirmada.
items.en: I understand that the date was already confirmed.

items.es: Sin embargo, me ha surgido un compromiso profesional urgente.
items.en: However, an urgent professional commitment has come up.

items.es: Si fuera posible, le agradecería cambiar la reunión al viernes.
items.en: If possible, I would appreciate changing the meeting to Friday.

items.es: Quedo a la espera de sus comentarios.
